title: Reverse a String
description:
Write a function that reverses a string and returns the reversed result.

Example:
Input: "python"
Output: "nohtyp"
hint: You can use slicing, a loop, or two pointers to reverse the characters.

title: Valid Palindrome
description:
Given a string, determine if it is a palindrome after converting all uppercase letters to lowercase and removing non-alphanumeric characters.

Example:
Input: "A man, a plan, a canal: Panama"
Output: true
hint: Normalize the string first, then compare characters from both ends.

title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
description:
Given a string s, find the length of the longest substring without repeating characters.

Example:
Input: "abcabcbb"
Output: 3
hint: Use a sliding window with a hash map to track character positions.

title: Longest Palindromic Substring
description:
Given a string s, return the longest palindromic substring.

Example:
Input: "babad"
Output: "bab"
hint: Expand around the center of each possible palindrome.

title: Longest Valid Parentheses
description:
Given a string containing '(' and ')', find the length of the longest valid parentheses substring.

Example:
Input: "(()"
Output: 2
hint: Use a stack or dynamic programming to track valid ranges.

title: Regular Expression Matching
description:
Implement pattern matching with support for '.' and '*'.

Example:
Input:
s = "aab"
p = "c*a*b"
Output: true
hint: Use dynamic programming to compare string and pattern states.
